heading: Retired commissioned officers: status
label: 9203 Retired commissioned officers: status
text: A retired commissioned officer of the Air Force or the Space Force who is on active duty is considered, for all purposes except promotion, to be an officer of the organization to which he is assigned.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)850310:999., subch. XX (2d par.), .July 9, 1918, ch. 14340 Stat. 893The words “and shall be an extra number therein” are omitted, since, in the opinion of the Judge Advocate General of the Army (JAG 210.85, ), they were repealed by the , . The words “in the discretion of the President, employed * * * assigned to duty” are omitted as surplusage. The words “arms, corps, department” are omitted, since the Air Force does not have organic corps created by statute.Feb. 21, 1923Act of July 31, 1935, ch. 42249 Stat. 505
Amendments2021— inserted “or the Space Force” after “the Air Force”.Pub. L. 116–2832018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 8503 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019
